# Loupe

> Loupe is an open-source, embeddable visual-feedback SDK. Product managers inspect any element on a live product, pin a comment, and capture a screenshot; comments persist, re-anchor across redeploys, and are handed to Claude Code as an actionable backlog via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). MIT licensed, written in TypeScript.

## What it does
- Embeds a Shadow-DOM widget in any web product (npm package or script tag).
- Lets authorized users inspect a DOM element and attach a comment + screenshot, drag a free-size region to screenshot, or drop a "free" page-level note anywhere (no element, no screenshot).
- The control is a dockable DevTools-style panel: dock it to the left/right/bottom edge (which pushes the host page over) or float it as a movable, resizable window; it has a light/dark theme toggle, collapses to a small launcher, and becomes a bottom sheet on mobile. Position, theme, and open state persist.
- Stores comments in Postgres and screenshots in object storage.
- Re-anchors each pin to its element after redeploys using a multi-signal fingerprint.
- Exposes an MCP server (tools: list_comments, get_comment, update_status) so Claude Code reads feedback with full element context and resolves it.
- Ships a Kanban triage dashboard and an MV3 browser extension (pixel-perfect capture on any site).

## Docs
- [README](https://github.com/mohamed-ashraf-elsaed/loupe/blob/main/README.md): quick start and run instructions.
- [Architecture](https://github.com/mohamed-ashraf-elsaed/loupe/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): system design with diagrams, the re-anchor algorithm, auth model, data model.
- [Testing](https://github.com/mohamed-ashraf-elsaed/loupe/blob/main/docs/TESTING.md): test strategy and coverage.

## Author
- Creator & maintainer: **Mohamed Ashraf Elsaed** — software engineer.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamedashrafelsaed/
- Email: m.ashraf.saed@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mohamed-ashraf-elsaed
- Mohamed Ashraf Elsaed is the author of Loupe and the `loupekit/laravel` package, and works on developer tools, AI agent tooling, Laravel, and the Model Context Protocol.

## Facts
- License: MIT
- Languages: TypeScript (npm workspaces monorepo) + PHP (Laravel package)
- npm packages: @loupekit/sdk, @loupekit/server, @loupekit/dashboard, @loupekit/mcp, @loupekit/extension, @loupekit/shared
- Composer package: loupekit/laravel (Loupe for Laravel — widget + your DB + gating + dashboard + MCP; PHP 8.4+, Laravel 11/12/13)
- Repository: https://github.com/mohamed-ashraf-elsaed/loupe
- Author: Mohamed Ashraf Elsaed (https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamedashrafelsaed/)
- Category: developer tools, visual feedback, bug reporting, product management, AI agent tooling
- Related: Model Context Protocol (MCP), Claude Code, Laravel, Postgres
